nodes.name: FastaBatchedDataset
nodes.description: In-memory sequence dataset helpers aligned with the FastaBatchedDataset constructor, length, item access, and token-budget batching operations.
nodes.conceptual_summary: A stateful dataset facade represented here as pure functions over an explicit state dictionary.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: The registered atoms expose the class constructor and simple methods as explicit state-passing functions.

nodes.name: dataset_state_initialization
nodes.description: Copy aligned sequence labels and sequence strings into an explicit dataset state.

inputs.name: sequence_labels
inputs.constraints: Sequence identifiers; length must match sequence_strs.

inputs.name: sequence_strs
inputs.constraints: Biological sequence strings; one sequence per label.

outputs.name: dataset_state
outputs.constraints: Dictionary with copied sequence_labels and sequence_strs lists.

nodes.conceptual_summary: Aligned sequence-state constructor. The operation snapshots two same-length collections into an explicit dictionary state while preserving index alignment.
nodes.critic_notes: This atom covers the in-memory constructor path only; FASTA file parsing is not implemented by this registered function.

nodes.name: dataset_length_query
nodes.description: Return the number of labeled sequences in dataset_state.

nodes.name: dataset_item_retrieval
nodes.description: Retrieve a single labeled sequence by index from dataset_state.

inputs.name: dataset_state
inputs.constraints: Must contain sequence_labels and sequence_strs with equal length.

inputs.name: idx
inputs.constraints: Valid Python list index for the dataset.

nodes.name: token_budget_batch_planning
nodes.description: Compute sorted greedy batch index groups using sequence lengths and per-sequence token overhead.

inputs.name: toks_per_batch
inputs.constraints: Maximum token budget used by the greedy batching check.

inputs.name: extra_toks_per_seq
inputs.constraints: Per-sequence overhead added to each sequence length.

outputs.name: batch_indices
outputs.constraints: Each inner list contains original dataset indices.

nodes.type_signature: (dataset_state: DatasetState, toks_per_batch: int, extra_toks_per_seq: int = 0) -> list[list[int]]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Length-constrained sequential packing. Sequences are sorted by length, then greedily appended until the current maximum adjusted length times batch size would exceed the budget.
nodes.critic_notes: The implementation mirrors FastaBatchedDataset.get_batch_indices and does not reject a single sequence whose adjusted length exceeds the budget.
